creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
I still don't think www/uwsgi is the right place to add support for
webservers. The example provided by submitter is a different thing. I
believe webserver ports are the correct location for providing support
for uwsgi, because it is webserver's module which provides this support,
not uwsgi's module to provide support for webserver...You need
webserver's sources in order to compile the given module and that is not
available upon uwsgi's installation. I don't consider myself to be an
expert in this area, but someone will have to prove me wrong and this
has not happened yet.

On Fri, 10 Sep 2010 08:09:16 GMT, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: www/uwsgi: webservers modules missing
>
